title: Asking for Help: Classroom Communication Frames (K-2)
description: This pack provides essential sentence frames for K-2 ELL newcomers to confidently ask for help in English and Spanish classroom settings. Includes dialogue, speaking prompts, and worksheets.

sentence_frames.icon_prompt: A raised hand with a question mark
Two hands reaching toward each other
A child with hands together in a pleading gesture
A confused face with a question mark above
A pointing finger and an eye
A magnifying glass over an object
A child looking at a difficult task with a thought bubble
A wrench or tool icon representing assistance

dialogue_strips.context: A student is struggling to open a glue stick.
One student asks another for help finding a crayon.
The teacher just explained a math problem.

dialogue_strips.speaker_a_en: What do you need help with?
dialogue_strips.context: A student is having trouble drawing a star.

speaking_prompts.prompt_en: You can't reach the book on the shelf.
speaking_prompts.prompt_l2: No puedes alcanzar el libro en el estante.
speaking_prompts.visual_cue: Image of a child reaching for a book on a high shelf.

speaking_prompts.prompt_en: You don't know how to start your puzzle.
speaking_prompts.prompt_l2: No sabes cómo empezar tu rompecabezas.
speaking_prompts.visual_cue: Image of a child looking confused at a puzzle.

speaking_prompts.prompt_en: The teacher explained something, but you are confused.
speaking_prompts.prompt_l2: La maestra explicó algo, pero estás confundido.
speaking_prompts.visual_cue: Image of a child with a question mark above their head.

speaking_prompts.prompt_en: You want the teacher to show you how to cut the paper.
speaking_prompts.prompt_l2: Quieres que la maestra te muestre cómo cortar el papel.
speaking_prompts.visual_cue: Image of a child holding scissors and paper, looking at an adult.

worksheets.instructions_en: Trace the words. Then write them by yourself.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Traza las palabras. Luego escríbelas tú mismo.

items.content:
Trace: Can you help me? 
Write: _______________

worksheets.instructions_en: Read the sentence. Choose the best word to fill the blank. (Options: help, understand, show)
worksheets.instructions_l2: Lee la oración. Elige la mejor palabra para llenar el espacio en blanco. (Opciones: ayuda, entiendo, muéstrame)

teacher_notes.objective: Students will be able to use simple sentence frames to ask for help in common classroom situations, fostering independence and communication skills.
teacher_notes.suggested_use: Introduce frames one at a time with visual aids and gestures. Practice with 'choral repetition' and 'turn and talk' activities. Use dialogue strips for role-playing. Integrate speaking prompts into daily routines for real-time practice. Worksheets can be used for independent practice or assessment.
materials_needed: Realia (e.g., a difficult puzzle, a book on a high shelf, art supplies)
differentiation_tips: Support: Pair students with a more proficient peer, provide sentence starters with visual cues, model extensively, use hand-over-hand for writing practice.
Challenge: Encourage students to add one more detail (e.g., 'Help me with the red crayon.'), ask 'Why do you need help?' and guide them to simple answers.
